core_concept: A visually stunning homepage combining Stripe/Linear precision with Apple-level polish. Uses a warm off-white luxury background, floating 3D glass cards, soft ambient shadows, and dynamic mesh gradients.

typography.instructions: Use font-medium for headings to keep the Apple/Linear aesthetic. Highlight key terms in gradients (purple/blue/orange). DO NOT USE INTER for headings.

gradients.text_highlight: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 via-purple-600 to-orange-500

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Use Bento grid (Tetris style) for category and featured sections. Massive gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Avoid uniform symmetrical squares where possible.

surface_strategies.cards: Crystal Glass variant. bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] rounded-3xl. Must include subtle inner highlight.
surface_strategies.buttons: Tactile buttons. Primary: bg-zinc-900 text-white shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-2xl hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-all rounded-full. Include a subtle inner glow.
surface_strategies.search_bar: Massive floating pill. bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-zinc-200/50 shadow-2xl p-4 flex items-center gap-4 rounded-full max-w-4xl mx-auto.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Hover tilt interactions on all job cards (using Framer Motion whileHover={{ scale: 1.02, rotateX: 2, rotateY: 2 }}).
interactions_and_motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is MANDATORY. Elements should fade in and float up staggered using Framer Motion.
interactions_and_motion.background: Animate the mesh gradient to shift colors softly, or use floating subtle orbs via framer-motion.

backgrounds.description: Abstract 3D mesh gradient background. Place in absolute positioning behind the hero section with opacity 50-70%, mix-blend-multiply.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Framer Motion heavily for hover effects (scale, tilt with rotateX/Y), staggered entrances, and floating particles in the hero.
Do NOT use raw Shadcn cards. Build custom div cards using the defined Crystal Glass surface classes (bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, border-white/40).
Integrate the generated 3D icons inside category cards. Do not use standard lucide icons for categories.
For the logo wall, install 'react-icons' and use SiApple, SiStripe, SiLinear, SiRaycast, SiVercel. Color them zinc-400 with hover:text-zinc-900 transition.
Ensure 'Outfit' and 'Satoshi' fonts are imported via Google Fonts or Fontsource.
Use react-countup or framer-motion for the animated stats counters.
Search bar must be fully interactive (UI only) with custom dropdowns/focus states, avoiding native browser styles.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-search-button').
Never use plain white or plain black; always use the subtle tinted shades provided.
Ensure the hero has overlapping floating 3D job cards wrapping the main text.
Ensure React and Framer Motion code is written in .js/.jsx, not .tsx as per the environment constraints.
